inputs.label: Amplitude 1
inputs.businessContext: Coefficient of the first exponential term in the Laplace inverse

inputs.label: Decay Rate 1
inputs.businessContext: Pole location for the first exponential (positive for stable decay)

inputs.label: Amplitude 2
inputs.businessContext: Coefficient of the second exponential term

inputs.label: Decay Rate 2
inputs.businessContext: Pole location for the second exponential

inputs.label: Amplitude 3
inputs.businessContext: Coefficient of the third exponential term

inputs.label: Decay Rate 3
inputs.businessContext: Pole location for the third exponential

inputs.label: Time
inputs.businessContext: Time point at which to evaluate the inverse Laplace transform
